purpose: Read-only public-dashboard source registry for expanding SSIP discovery across official central and state startup, innovation, MSME, grant, challenge and programme portals.
important_note: These entries are official discovery sources, not validated scheme records. They must not be counted as schemes until the SSIP discovery, extraction, validation, admin-review and publication pipeline accepts them.

sources.name: National Portal of India - Government Schemes
sources.coverage_note: National portal entry point for government schemes, services and directories.

sources.name: myScheme - National Scheme Discovery Platform
sources.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
sources.coverage_note: National platform for one-stop discovery of Government schemes and application guidance.

sources.name: Startup India - Central Government Schemes
sources.department: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
sources.coverage_note: Startup-specific central schemes and policies compiled for entrepreneurs.

sources.name: Startup India - Programs and Challenges
sources.department: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
sources.coverage_note: Startup India programmes, challenges, awards and applications.

sources.name: Startup India - Incubator Schemes
sources.department: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
sources.coverage_note: Incubator-facing schemes and support programmes.

sources.name: Startup India - State and UT Startup Policies
sources.department: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
sources.coverage_note: Umbrella source for official State/UT startup policies and state-level startup support.

sources.name: Ministry of MSME - Schemes
sources.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
sources.department: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
sources.coverage_note: MSME support and enterprise development schemes; current SSIP audit identified MSME as a coverage gap.

sources.name: National Small Industries Corporation
sources.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
sources.department: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
sources.coverage_note: MSME support agency and scheme implementation channel.

sources.name: Stand-Up India
sources.coverage_note: Credit support for eligible entrepreneurs and greenfield enterprises.

sources.name: MUDRA
sources.coverage_note: Micro enterprise funding and refinance support.

sources.name: BIRAC - Support for Startups
sources.coverage_note: Biotechnology startup grants, incubation, seed fund, challenges and calls.

sources.name: DST - Schemes and Programmes
sources.coverage_note: DST schemes, programmes and calls including innovation, R&D and technology development.

sources.name: NIDHI - DST Startup Support
sources.coverage_note: DST startup and innovation support programme family.

sources.name: Technology Development Board
sources.coverage_note: Technology commercialisation and industrial innovation support.

sources.name: Department of Scientific and Industrial Research
sources.department: Department of Scientific and Industrial Research (DSIR)
sources.coverage_note: Industrial research, technology development and innovation support source.

sources.name: MeitY Startup Hub
sources.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
sources.department: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
sources.coverage_note: MeitY startup schemes, cohorts, innovation programmes and ecosystem support.

sources.name: MeitY - Schemes and Services
sources.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
sources.department: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
sources.coverage_note: Electronics, IT, digital public infrastructure and innovation scheme source.

sources.name: Software Technology Parks of India
sources.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
sources.department: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
sources.coverage_note: Technology entrepreneurship, incubation and startup support source.

sources.name: IndiaAI
sources.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
sources.coverage_note: AI mission, compute, innovation and startup-relevant programme source.

sources.name: Atal Innovation Mission
sources.coverage_note: Flagship innovation and entrepreneurship mission with incubators, challenges and startup programmes.

sources.name: iDEX - Innovations for Defence Excellence
sources.coverage_note: Defence innovation challenges and startup support.

sources.name: IN-SPACe
sources.department: Indian National Space Promotion and Authorization Centre
sources.coverage_note: Space-sector startup authorization, promotion and opportunity source.

sources.name: Ministry of Education Innovation Cell
sources.coverage_note: Student innovation, institutional innovation councils and entrepreneurship programmes.

sources.name: Smart India Hackathon
sources.coverage_note: National innovation challenge programme for students and innovators.

sources.name: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
sources.ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
sources.department: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
sources.coverage_note: Renewable energy schemes and innovation-relevant programme source.

sources.name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana
sources.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
sources.department: Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
sources.coverage_note: Agriculture innovation and agritech support source.

sources.name: Kerala Startup Mission
sources.coverage_note: State startup mission with programmes, schemes, market access and funding support.

sources.name: Startup Odisha
sources.coverage_note: State startup portal and policy support source.
